visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Intro: The frame displays a metal shopping cart filled with various grocery items in a warehouse-style setting. Large, vibrant text overlays in Traditional Chinese dominate the center, announcing "Costco Weekly Special Report" with specific dates. Cartoon character graphics and stylized storm icons are visible at the corners of the frame. The background reveals industrial shelving and bright warehouse lighting. (2) Product Showcase: A rapid succession of shots features various consumer goods on store shelves. Items include vacuum-sealed pork slices, yellow tins of Fernleaf milk powder, and Kirkland strawberry cakes. Each shot is accompanied by a large text overlay showing the original price, the discount amount, and the final sale price. The lighting remains bright and consistent throughout the aisles. (3) Continued Montage: The sequence transitions through diverse departments, showing packaged snacks like Meiji chocolates, bulk boxes of Quaker oatmeal, and household items like Persil detergent. The camera focuses on the packaging details and brand logos. Large bold text continues to flash the value propositions for each item. The setting shifts from refrigerated cases to dry good aisles. (4) Outro: The video concludes with shots of bottled wine and cleaning products. The visual rhythm remains fast, with cuts every two seconds. The final frame features multiple wine bottles with price tags. The lighting is uniform and professional, highlighting the product features clearly against the warehouse background.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: No real people are visible in the video frames; only product shots and text overlays are present.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video features various aisles and sections within a Costco warehouse store. Visible backgrounds include refrigerated display cases for meat and cakes, industrial metal shelving stacked with bulk boxes of dry goods, and specialized displays for household cleaners and alcoholic beverages. The environment is clean, orderly, and brightly lit with standard warehouse overhead lights.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Intro: A high-arousal male voice energetically announces the "Costco Weekly Specials." The vocal delivery is sharp with high pitch variability and an extremely rapid speech rate. Simultaneously, a high-tempo electronic BGM with a strong, driving four-on-the-floor beat begins. The audio signal is exceptionally clean, indicating a studio-recorded voiceover with high spectral brightness and clarity. (2) Product Rundown: The narrator continues a fast-paced delivery, reciting names and discounted prices for dozens of various products. His tone is consistently animated and persuasive, typical of promotional media. The background music maintains its energetic electronic rhythm, perfectly complementing the rapid vocal pace. There are no significant pauses or silence, creating a sense of urgency and high information density throughout the track. (3) Closing: The voiceover concludes with an enthusiastic call-to-action, urging listeners to follow for more shopping updates. The intensity remains high until the final second of the recording. The BGM concludes sharply with the final vocal syllable. The overall audio production is heavily compressed for social media clarity, ensuring the voice stands out prominently over the consistent musical bed.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional bulletin to inform Costco members in Taiwan about the weekly special offers and discounts. By utilizing a high-energy voiceover and rapid-fire visual montage, it aims to create excitement and urgency among shoppers, encouraging them to visit the store during the specified dates to take advantage of the deals.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video clearly lists specific products and their discounted prices at Costco, using direct promotional language.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video is a typical 'short-form' social media advertisement characterized by high information density, rapid cuts, and high-energy audio to maximize viewer retention and engagement.
